mapper.select:
SELECT eduStudentExamRecord.* , eduChapterExamPaper.paper_name AS paperName , eduStudentUser.real_name AS realName FROM edu_student_exam_record eduStudentExamRecord LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper ON eduStudentExamRecord.paper_id = eduChapterExamPaper.id LEFT JOIN edu_student_user eduStudentUser ON eduStudentExamRecord.student_id = eduStudentUser.id
ORDER BY eduStudentExamRecord.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_student_exam_record eduStudentExamRecord LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper ON eduStudentExamRecord.paper_id = eduChapterExamPaper.id LEFT JOIN edu_student_user eduStudentUser ON eduStudentExamRecord.student_id = eduStudentUser.id

SELECT eduStudentExamRecord.* , eduChapterExamPaper.paper_name AS paperName , eduStudentUser.real_name AS realName FROM edu_student_exam_record eduStudentExamRecord LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper ON eduStudentExamRecord.paper_id = eduChapterExamPaper.id LEFT JOIN edu_student_user eduStudentUser ON eduStudentExamRecord.student_id = eduStudentUser.id
ORDER BY eduStudentExamRecord.create_time DESC

SELECT eduStudentExamRecord.* , eduChapterExamPaper.paper_name AS paperName , eduStudentUser.real_name AS realName FROM edu_student_exam_record eduStudentExamRecord LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper eduChapterExamPaper ON eduStudentExamRecord.paper_id = eduChapterExamPaper.id LEFT JOIN edu_student_user eduStudentUser ON eduStudentExamRecord.student_id = eduStudentUser.id WHERE eduStudentExamRecord.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.exam_no AS examNo, r.paper_id AS paperId, r.student_id AS studentId, r.submit_status AS submitStatus, r.start_time AS startTime, r.submit_time AS submitTime, r.objective_score AS objectiveScore, r.subjective_score AS subjectiveScore, r.total_score AS totalScore, r.correct_rate AS correctRate, r.duration_seconds AS durationSeconds, r.create_time AS createTime, p.paper_name AS paperName, p.total_score AS paperTotalScore, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, c.course_name AS courseName FROM edu_student_exam_record r LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper p ON r.paper_id = p.id LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter ch ON p.chapter_id = ch.id LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON ch.course_id = c.id
AND r.student_id = #{studentId} AND ch.course_id = #{courseId} AND p.chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND c.course_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseName}, '%') AND ch.chapter_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{chapterName}, '%') AND p.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{paperName}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM edu_student_exam_answer a INNER JOIN edu_question_bank q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE a.exam_record_id = r.id AND q.question_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{questionKeyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_student_exam_record r LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper p ON r.paper_id = p.id LEFT JOIN edu_course_chapter ch ON p.chapter_id = ch.id LEFT JOIN edu_course c ON ch.course_id = c.id
AND r.student_id = #{studentId} AND ch.course_id = #{courseId} AND p.chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND c.course_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{courseName}, '%') AND ch.chapter_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{chapterName}, '%') AND p.paper_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{paperName}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM edu_student_exam_answer a INNER JOIN edu_question_bank q ON a.question_id = q.id WHERE a.exam_record_id = r.id AND q.question_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{questionKeyword}, '%') )

SELECT r.id, r.exam_no AS examNo, r.paper_id AS paperId, r.student_id AS studentId, r.submit_status AS submitStatus, r.start_time AS startTime, r.submit_time AS submitTime, r.objective_score AS objectiveScore, r.subjective_score AS subjectiveScore, r.total_score AS totalScore, r.correct_rate AS correctRate, r.duration_seconds AS durationSeconds, r.create_time AS createTime, p.paper_name AS paperName, p.total_score AS paperTotalScore, ch.id AS chapterId, ch.chapter_name AS chapterName, c.course_name AS courseName FROM edu_student_exam_record r INNER JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper p ON r.paper_id = p.id INNER JOIN edu_course_chapter ch ON p.chapter_id = ch.id INNER JOIN edu_course c ON ch.course_id = c.id WHERE ch.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY ch.chapter_order ASC, r.create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) AS totalSubmitted, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN r.total_score >= IFNULL(ep.total_score, 100) * 0.6 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SIGNED) AS passCount FROM edu_student_exam_record r LEFT JOIN edu_chapter_exam_paper ep ON r.paper_id = ep.id WHERE r.submit_status = 1
